properties.description: Attractive three bedroom semi-detached family home situated within 0.5 miles of Petts Wood station with fast trains to London and within easy walking distance of local shops, schools, bus routes and National Trust woodland. The property comprises; two receptions, fitted 18'9 x 10'1 kitchen/breakfast room and conservatory. The property also benefits from having a utility room and cloakroom. To the first floor there are three bedrooms and a family bathroom with separate WC. Additional features include double glazing, gas central heating and a well presented interior.
properties.location: Petts Wood Road, Petts Wood, Orpington

properties.description: Presented in excellent decorative order throughout is this two double bedroom, two bathroom, garden flat. The modern fitted kitchen is open plan to the living room which boasts solid wooden floors and includes integrated appliances including a dishwasher and a washing machine. This large open plan benefits from bi folding doors onto a secluded private courtyard garden. Both bedrooms are double sized, and the family bathroom boasts a matching three piece suite with a shower attachment over the bath. There is also a separate wet room. There are walnut doors throughout and wiring for Sky TV/aerial points in the living room/kitchen and both bedrooms. This apartment being only five years old, is still under a 10 year building guarantee.

An exceptional five bedroom Regency townhouse arranged over four floors, moments from Regent's Park. The raised ground floor offers a magnificent double reception room with original cornicing, sash windows and two feature fireplaces. The lower ground floor comprises a bespoke kitchen/dining room opening onto a landscaped patio garden. Five generous bedrooms occupy the upper floors, including a principal suite with dressing area and en-suite bathroom. Further benefits include a study, guest cloakroom, extensive storage and access to the sought-after private communal gardens. Ideally placed for the amenities of Marylebone and Camden and the open spaces of Regent's Park.

A superbly presented one bedroom apartment in a modern development within walking distance of Eltham High Street and mainline station. The bright open-plan reception features floor-to-ceiling windows, a contemporary fitted kitchen with integrated appliances and space for a dining table. The double bedroom includes built-in wardrobes, served by a stylish bathroom with rainfall shower over the bath. Additional benefits include secure entry, allocated parking, a private balcony and the remainder of an NHBC guarantee. An ideal first purchase or buy-to-let investment with excellent transport links to central London.

A handsome four bedroom detached family residence occupying a generous plot on one of Bromley's most desirable roads. The welcoming hallway leads to a triple-aspect lounge with feature fireplace, separate dining room with french doors to the garden, and a substantial kitchen/breakfast room with granite worktops and a range cooker. Upstairs are four well-proportioned bedrooms, the master with en-suite, plus a modern family bathroom. Outside, the property enjoys a carriage driveway with parking for several vehicles, an integral double garage and a beautifully maintained 90ft rear garden with patio and mature borders. Within catchment of outstanding local schools.

A striking three bedroom warehouse conversion apartment in the heart of Camden, combining period industrial character with contemporary specification. The impressive 25ft reception enjoys exposed brickwork, cast-iron columns and vast crittall-style windows flooding the space with light. The sleek handleless kitchen features quartz surfaces and integrated appliances. Three double bedrooms include a principal with en-suite shower room, complemented by a luxurious family bathroom. Further benefits include lift access, video entry, and secure bicycle storage. Camden Town underground, the Regent's Canal and the market are all within a short stroll.

A charming two bedroom Victorian cottage brimming with character, quietly situated yet convenient for Orpington town centre and station. The bay-fronted sitting room retains its original fireplace and stripped floorboards, flowing into a cosy dining area and a recently refitted shaker-style kitchen. Upstairs are two comfortable double bedrooms and a modern white bathroom suite. To the rear is a delightful cottage garden with brick-paved patio, lawn and well-stocked flower beds. Offered with no onward chain, this is a rare opportunity to acquire a genuinely characterful home in a popular residential pocket.
